detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文閱讀與寫作輔導 (English Reading and Writing)	開課班級 : 應英四甲	學　　分 : 0.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 劉素勳,洪淑敏	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
To enhance students’ skills in English Readings and writings with informative texts covering a variety of topic, along with active and meaningful discussions in class. It also helps to build up vocabulary with comprehensive readings and offers writing practices to hone students’ writing skills. Furthermore, it helps to improve students’ Test-taking skills for TOEIC. All in all, it aims to develop students’ reading comprehension ability, vocabulary skills, critical thinking, as well as how to write well-organized, adequately developed paragraphs and essays in English. 


2.教學綱要
1. To help students learn how to read efficiently, identify main ideals and analyze key concepts.
2. To familiarize students with writing strategies as well as how to organize an essay
3. To develop students’ critical thinking abilities
4. To improve Test-taking skills for TOEIC
 


3.教科書
1	書名 : NEW TOEIC TEST金色證書-閱讀　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 眾文出版社　版本 :  
2	書名 : The House on the Mango Street　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : Vintage　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Week one to Week eight midterm exam 30% Two Compositions 50% attendance 20% week nine to week sixteenth 50% attendance, class discussion, quiz and homework, 25% midterm exam, 25% final exam  
Grades would be deducted for any following reasons: late for class, absence, without textbook in class, using cell phone.  
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
